name: Dallas Northeast Campground & RV Park
summary_text: A Good Sam-rated RV resort east of Dallas offering full-hookup sites, family-friendly amenities, and convenient access directly off Interstate 30.

otherNotes: Concrete pads available on some sites
Excellent Starlink reception due to open skies

reviews.text: We stayed at Dallas Northeast Campground & RV Park in Caddo Mills, Texas, and overall had a great experience. The staff was friendly and helpful, and the campground was clean with well-maintained gravel roads and a mix of gravel and concrete sites. We especially enjoyed the fishing lake, swimming pool, splash pad, playground, camp store, and fitness center, making it a great stop for families. The campground is conveniently located just off Interstate 30, making it an excellent overnight stop while traveling across Texas. Shopping and restaurants are only about 20 minutes away, with a local market just a few minutes from the campground. Being close to the interstate does mean there is some highway noise, but the convenience outweighs the downside for a travel stop. Wi-Fi was adequate, and the open sky provided excellent Starlink performance. There is a mix of overnight campers and longer-term residents, which didn't impact our stay. Overall, we would happily stay here again.
